info.text: Life is running a race blindfolded.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is jumping in the water before you know how to swim.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is jumping without knowing where you'll land.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is a long distance run.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is a cross country journey.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is looking both ways before you cross the street and getting hit by an airplane.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is a movie with the script always changing.
